summary: Comprehensive testing of KitaTracker after major refactoring. Server.py (2000+ lines) successfully broken into modular route files. All 41 backend API tests passed. Frontend fully functional with all pages loading correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after

passed_tests: GET /api/budgets/status - returns budget status with spending
GET /api/notifications - returns notifications with unread count

frontend_verified.landing_page: PASS - Shows KitaTracker logo, Continue with Google/Email buttons
frontend_verified.login_form: PASS - Email/password fields, Log In button, Forgot password link
frontend_verified.dashboard: PASS - Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Profit metrics, charts
frontend_verified.income_page: PASS - Income list with entries, Add Income button, Export CSV
frontend_verified.expenses_page: PASS - Expenses list, Add Expense button
frontend_verified.budgets_page: PASS - Budget cards with progress bars, Add Budget button, alerts
frontend_verified.recurring_page: PASS - Recurring list, Add Recurring button, Generate Entries button
frontend_verified.reports_page: PASS - Income by Product/Customer charts, Print button
frontend_verified.settings_page: PASS - Products, Categories, Alerts, Import, Backup tabs
frontend_verified.notification_bell: PASS - Bell icon in header, dropdown shows notifications
frontend_verified.navigation: PASS - All nav links work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: server.py split into modular routes (auth.py, income.py, expenses.py, budgets.py, recurring.py, notifications.py, analytics.py, users.py, misc.py)
database.py properly handles auth with require_auth dependency
email_service.py integrates SendGrid for real email verification
All routes properly use user_id from require_auth for data isolation
Console chart warnings are cosmetic - charts render correctly after initial load
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefixed entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring complete and verified. Server.py broken into modular route files in /routes directory. All CRUD operations for income, expenses, budgets, recurring, notifications work correctly. SendGrid email integration added for verification emails. Frontend fully functional with all pages loading and displaying data correctly.

new_route_files: /app/backend/routes/auth.py - Authentication (login, register, verify, password reset, Google OAuth)
